nasb.text: And a centurion’s slave, who was highly regarded by him, was sick and about to die.

esv.text: Now a centurion had a servant who was sick and at the point of death, who was highly valued by him.

cnv.text: 有百夫長所重用的一個奴僕，病得快要死了。

ccb.text: 当时，有一个百夫长很赏识的奴仆病了，生命垂危。

csbs.text: 有个百夫长所重视的奴仆病得快要死了。
